models.name: inspect_ai
models.description: Inspect: A framework for large language model evaluations

models.name: Open-dLLM
models.description: Open diffusion language model for code generation — releasing pretraining, evaluation, inference, and checkpoints.

models.name: NewsPilot
models.description: NewsPilot is an automated intelligence analysis system based on Large Language Models (LLM), designed to transform massive global news into personalized, actionable insights. It is not just a news aggregation tool, but a 24/7 intelligent intelligence assistant that understands your profession, holdings, and interests.

models.name: EdgeRazor
models.description: EdgeRazor: A Lightweight Framework for Large Language Models via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation

models.name: Multi-User-LLM-Agent
models.description: Official code for the paper: "Multi-User Large Language Model Agents"

models.name: COMPASS
models.description: INFRA-COMPASS is a tool that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to create and maintain an inventory of state and local codes and ordinances applicable to energy infrastructure.

models.name: ARC-Neuron-LLMBuilder
models.description: A governed local AI build-and-memory system that trains small brains, compares them, protects the better one, archives the worse one, and preserves the evidence of why. v1.0.0-governed release.

models.name: Auto-Pentest-LLM
models.description: 🔍 Automate penetration testing with an intelligent agent that organizes security assessments, leveraging local LLMs and Kali Linux for effective exploitation.

models.name: llm
models.description: A bunch of experiments using Large Language Models

models.name: NucBench
models.description: NucBench is the first open-access benchmark designed to evaluate multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) for various nuclear engineering applications.

models.name: NeoOLAF
models.description: NeoOLAF is a next-generation ontology learning framework designed to automatically construct application-oriented ontologies from unstructured text by combining symbolic semantics, large language models, and agentic reasoning workflows.

models.name: Alpha-Omega-Plus
models.description: Verify large language model reasoning with a meta-layer for stability, coherence, and hallucination detection using tetralectic logic and scoring

models.name: ai-sub
models.description: ai-sub is a lightweight content subscription project focused on LLM and AI Coding. It aggregates, curates, and pushes high-signal news updates and blog posts about model releases, tooling, prompting/workflows, and real-world engineering practices—so you can follow the fast-moving AI ecosystem in one place.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: ai-agent-pulse
models.description: Daily automated tracking of 19 AI agent frameworks. Pulse Score ranks momentum via star velocity, release freshness, commit activity, and community health.

models.name: Chronos-Matrix-Profile
models.description: This work proposes a new anomaly detection pipeline that aims to bridge the gap between classical distance-based approaches and recent developments with Large Language Models (LLMs). In particular, the method combines the efficiency of the DAMP algorithm, which is built on the Matrix Profile framework, with the forecasting capabilities of Chronos

models.name: INT-6940---AI-New-Store-Support-System---phase-1
models.description: This project is to use python and Structured Query Language with some known exiting store data to predict if someone wanted to start a new store in the same area, how likely the new store would be visited. Using Huff Model.

models.name: Fake-News-Detection
models.description: Real-Time Fake News Detection offers an API-first approach to content moderation and journalistic verification. Powered by advanced Natural Language Processing (NLP) and ensemble tree models, this platform analyzes structure, sentiment, and context to deliver actionable credibility metrics.

models.name: nayantra
models.description: An open-source framework that connects large language models to autonomous robot fleets via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Open-RMF. Drives NVIDIA Isaac Sim or real Nav2 robots; a built-in stub mode runs the full pipeline on a laptop.

models.name: turboquant-svd
models.description: Applying TurboQuant-inspired sensitivity and spectrum-based rank selection to SVD compression of large language models.

models.name: sinoclaw-agent
models.description: AI coding agent powered by large language models — fork from nousresearch/hermes-agent

models.name: state-media-influence-llm.github.io
models.description: Companion site for 'How Government Control of Media Influences Large Language Models'

models.name: SafeWeights-ACL
models.description: Identify and intervene on safety-critical parameters in large language models to mitigate jailbreak risks without retraining.

models.name: SharedRequest
models.description: Implement privacy-preserving inference for large language models using a model-agnostic discrimination approach to secure user queries.

models.name: Neural_Memory_Operating_system
models.description: Predict large language model inference with memory prefetching and speculative decoding for faster reasoning on low VRAM hardware

models.name: laboratorio-evaluacion-llm-local
models.description: Laboratorio local y reproducible para evaluación de LLM (Large Language Models – Grandes Modelos de Lenguaje), respuestas generativas, datasets dorados, rúbricas, regresión de prompts e informes de calidad en castellano.

models.name: emotion_vector
models.description: 本项目实现了 Anthropic 论文《大型语言模型中的情绪概念及其功能》(Emotion Concepts and their Function in a Large Language Model) 的核心实验，可以在本地开源模型中复现情绪向量的提取和因果干预。

models.name: Accumulative-Decoding
models.description: Reduce hallucinations in large vision-language models with training-free accumulative decoding for more accurate outputs

models.name: AI_Chatbot
models.description: An AI chatbot is a software application designed to simulate human conversation via text or voice, using technologies like Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning (ML) to understand, learn, and respond to user queries in real time. Unlike traditional chatbots, AI bots use Large Language Models (LLMs) to engage in natural, context.

models.name: supply-chain-monitor
models.description: Monitor PyPI and npm releases for supply chain threats, diff package changes, and alert on malicious updates with LLM-based analysis

models.name: llmtest-perf
models.description: Validate LLM inference performance and catch latency, throughput, and TTFT regressions before release

models.name: auto-crawl-tiktok-post-fb
models.description: Automate TikTok to Facebook posting, schedule Reels, and manage AI replies, inbox, campaigns, and workers in one dashboard

models.name: auto-hf-papers
models.description: Automate Hugging Face Daily Papers filtering and email a daily Markdown digest of the most relevant AI papers by upvotes and GitHub stars

models.name: llm-seclint
models.description: Scan Python code for LLM security flaws before release.

models.name: vgt-auto-punisher
models.description: Detect and block network threats in Linux kernels using hybrid L4 and L7 behavioral analysis for effective intrusion prevention and response.

models.name: OnePersonCompany
models.description: Transform daily progress into structured reports, release notes, and shareable content to simplify solo or small team project management.

models.name: llm-youtube-landscape-tracker
models.description: Python + Next.js pipeline for collecting YouTube transcripts, extracting LLM topics, and publishing a live, transcript-grounded dashboard that maps how channels cover LLMs, AI agents, coding assistants, model releases, benchmarks, and related developer workflows.

models.name: daily-brief
models.description: An automated personal daily briefing agent that crawls tech news sources, summarizes the top stories using a free LLM, generates an audio MP3, commits a Markdown brief to a GitHub repo, uploads the MP3 as a GitHub Release asset, and deploys a GitHub Pages web archive

models.name: cycles-client-python
models.description: Python SDK for Cycles — reserve, commit, release budget and risk for AI agents

models.name: AI-News-Newsletter-Assistant
models.description: Aggregate and summarize AI news from RSS feeds using multithreading and large language models, delivering formatted newsletters to your email automatically.

models.name: memfuse
models.description: MemFuse offers a robust memory layer for large language models, enhancing their performance and efficiency. Join our community on GitHub to explore features, report issues, or request new functionalities! 🐙💻

models.name: news-atom-lite
models.description: Extract structured events and atoms (sentence-level knowledge units) from news articles using any language model.

models.name: new-language-model
models.description: The New Language Model uses context engineering to facilitate Bible translation.

models.name: FAKE-NEWS-AI-PROJECT
models.description: 🚀 Project Overview  This project is an AI-powered web application that can:  Generate realistic fake news articles using a Large Language Model (LLM).  Detect whether a news article is Fake or Real using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning.

models.name: fake-news-detection
models.description: A machine learning-based web application that detects fake news articles using natural language processing techniques. The model analyzes text input and classifies it as real or fake, helping users verify information quickly.

models.name: Nova-ai-bot-new-
models.description: Nova is highly professional ai language model

models.name: Multi-Modal-Domain-Adaptation
models.description: A showcase-ready implementation of multi-modal domain adaptation for vision-language models. This project demonstrates how to adapt pre-trained CLIP models to new domains using parameter-efficient fine-tuning techniques.

models.name: Udacity-PriceScout---The-AI-Powered-Competitor-Analyst
models.description: For this project, you're a Senior Strategy Analyst at a new, fast-growing AI company. Your company builds infrastructure for developers to run large language models, and you're in a market with tons of competition. Everyone is changing their prices, adding new models, and updating features every week.

models.name: RAG--Retrieval-Augmented-Generation-Model
models.description: Large Language Models are are trained on vast amount of data , but the issue with LLM is they cannot provide correct results with new info and information in specific context. To solve this issue RAG models are used , a rag model is trained on specific data to get more accurate results.

models.name: Rank-Based-Perplexity
models.description: The code for my Bachelor thesis project in which a new evaluation for long-context Large Language Models is proposed.

models.name: LocalAgent-SLM
models.description: Build fully functional, offline AI agents that run entirely on your own hardware. This project leverages the new generation of compact, efficient Small Language Models (SLMs) to enable reasoning, planning, and task execution on standard laptops—eliminating API costs and ensuring total data privacy.
